ingredients.item:
This is the vegan version of stir-fried intestine with turmeric (lòng xào nghệ)—a popular specialty dish in Central Vietnam. The seitan in Vietnam comes in a tube shape, so it looks quite similar to the meat in the original dish when it’s cut into rings, but you can omit this ingredient if you prefer.
SKILL LEVELModerate|YIELD2 servings
7 ounces (200 g) oyster mushrooms, rinsed with salted water
ingredients.original:
This is the vegan version of stir-fried intestine with turmeric (lòng xào nghệ)—a popular specialty dish in Central Vietnam. The seitan in Vietnam comes in a tube shape, so it looks quite similar to the meat in the original dish when it’s cut into rings, but you can omit this ingredient if you prefer.
SKILL LEVELModerate|YIELD2 servings
7 ounces (200 g) oyster mushrooms, rinsed with salted water

ingredients.item: 3-inch (7.5 cm) piece fresh turmeric, peeled, or 1 teaspoon turmeric powder (see Note)
ingredients.original: 3-inch (7.5 cm) piece fresh turmeric, peeled, or 1 teaspoon turmeric powder (see Note)

ingredients.item: 3 ounces (90 g) store-bought or homemade seitan, cut into ¼-inch (6 mm) thick rings (optional)
ingredients.original: 3 ounces (90 g) store-bought or homemade seitan, cut into ¼-inch (6 mm) thick rings (optional)

ingredients.item: 1 ounce (28 g) cilantro or Vietnamese mint leaves, for garnish
ingredients.original: 1 ounce (28 g) cilantro or Vietnamese mint leaves, for garnish

ingredients.item: 1. Tear mushrooms lengthwise into quarters, squeeze out excess water, and set aside.
ingredients.original: 1. Tear mushrooms lengthwise into quarters, squeeze out excess water, and set aside.

ingredients.item: 2. Cut turmeric into smaller chunks, place in a resealable plastic bag, and crush finely with a pestle. Transfer to a bowl and set aside.
ingredients.original: 2. Cut turmeric into smaller chunks, place in a resealable plastic bag, and crush finely with a pestle. Transfer to a bowl and set aside.

ingredients.item: 3. In a large skillet, heat vegetable oil over low heat. When hot, add garlic and cook and stir until slightly golden around the edges (about 30 seconds). Add crushed turmeric and cook and stir for about 1 minute. Add mushrooms and seitan (if using) and continue to cook and stir until everything is thoroughly tinted yellow by the turmeric (about 1 minute).
ingredients.original: 3. In a large skillet, heat vegetable oil over low heat. When hot, add garlic and cook and stir until slightly golden around the edges (about 30 seconds). Add crushed turmeric and cook and stir for about 1 minute. Add mushrooms and seitan (if using) and continue to cook and stir until everything is thoroughly tinted yellow by the turmeric (about 1 minute).

ingredients.item: 4. Stir in salt, sugar, stock powder, turmeric powder (if using), and ground pepper, and then remove from heat.
ingredients.original: 4. Stir in salt, sugar, stock powder, turmeric powder (if using), and ground pepper, and then remove from heat.

ingredients.item: 5. Transfer to a platter and garnish with cilantro or Vietnamese mint, crushed peanuts, and sliced chili pepper (if using).
ingredients.original: 5. Transfer to a platter and garnish with cilantro or Vietnamese mint, crushed peanuts, and sliced chili pepper (if using).
